name: ModelSharingHandler
summary: Handles operations related to model sharing.

constructors.name: ModelSharingHandler
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ModelSharingHandler class.

methods.name: CreateBaselineAsync
methods.signature: public Task<ISharingResult> CreateBaselineAsync(string code, string comment, string releaseNextWriteOutComment = null)
methods.summary: Make a new baseline and upload it to the service with the specified code and comment.

params.name: code
params.doc: The code for the write-out operation.

params.name: comment
params.doc: A comment describing the write-out.

params.name: releaseNextWriteOutComment
params.doc: Optional. A comment for releasing the next write-out reservation. If provided, must not be empty.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult indicating the result of the making baseline operation.

methods.name: ExcludeAndOpen
methods.summary: Excludes the specified model from sharing and opens it. The currently opened model is closed.

params.name: modelPath
params.doc: The path to the model to exclude from sharing and open.

returns.doc: An ISharingResult indicating the result of the operation.

methods.name: GetLocationsAsync
methods.summary: Gets the list of available locations for shared models.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns information about available locations.

methods.name: GetModelsAsync
methods.summary: Gets the list of shared models available for the current user.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult containing a collection of ISharedModel.

methods.name: GetSharingEvents
methods.summary: Gets an instance of ISharingEvents to subscribe to sharing-related events.

returns.doc: An ISharingEvents instance for handling sharing events such as SharedModelStateChanged.

methods.name: GetUpdatesAsync
methods.summary: Get available updates for the model.

params.name: modelId
params.doc: The model id. If not provided or empty, the currently opened model is used.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns a list of udpates.

methods.name: InviteUserAsync
methods.signature: public Task<ISharingResult> InviteUserAsync(string userEmail, SharingRole role, bool sendEmail, string customEmailMessage, Guid? modelId = null)

params.name: userEmail
params.doc: The user email.

params.name: role
params.doc: The user role.

params.name: sendEmail
params.doc: If set, send an invitation email to the new user.

params.name: customEmailMessage
params.doc: If non-empty, add the message to the invitation email. HTML markup can be used.

params.name: modelId
params.doc: If set and nonempty, the model id to invite user to. If not set or empty, user is added to the currently opened model.

returns.doc: Awaitable task with the operation result.

methods.name: JoinAsync
methods.signature: public Task<ISharingResult> JoinAsync(Guid modelId, string joinFolder, Guid? targetUpdate = null)
methods.summary: Joins a shared model using the specified model identifier and join folder.

params.name: modelId
params.doc: The model identifier.

params.name: joinFolder
params.doc: The folder to join to.

params.name: targetUpdate
params.doc: The update to join to. If not set or empty, join to the latest update.

methods.name: ReadInAsync
methods.summary: Reads in updates to the shared model.

params.name: targetUpdate
params.doc: The update to read in. If not set or empty, reads in to the latest update.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult indicating the result of the read-in operation.

methods.name: ReleaseNextWriteOutAsync
methods.summary: Releases a previously reserved next write-out for the current user with the specified comment.

params.name: comment
params.doc: A comment describing the reason for the release. Must not be empty or whitespace.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult indicating the result of the release operation.

methods.name: RemoveModelAsync
methods.summary: Removes the shared model from the system.

params.name: modelId
params.doc: The identifier of the model to be removed.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult indicating the result of the remove operation.

methods.name: ReserveNextWriteOutAsync
methods.summary: Reserves the next write-out for the current user with the specified comment.

params.name: comment
params.doc: A comment describing the reason for the reservation. Must not be empty or whitespace.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult indicating the result of the reserve operation.

methods.name: StartSharingAsync
methods.signature: public Task<ISharingResult<Guid>> StartSharingAsync(string code, string description, Guid? location = null)
methods.summary: Starts sharing a model with the specified code, description, and location.

params.name: code
params.doc: The sharing code for the model.

params.name: description
params.doc: A description for the shared model.

params.name: location
params.doc: The location of the shared model. If not provided or empty, the default location is used.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult<T> containing the unique identifier of the shared model.

methods.name: WriteOutAsync
methods.signature: public Task<ISharingResult> WriteOutAsync(string code, string comment, string releaseNextWriteOutComment = null)
methods.summary: Writes out changes to the service with the specified code and comment. Automatically release the next write-out reservation if there is one.

params.name: code
params.doc: The code for the write-out operation.

params.name: comment
params.doc: A comment describing the write-out.

params.name: releaseNextWriteOutComment
params.doc: Optional. A comment for releasing the next write-out reservation. If provided, must not be empty.

returns.doc: An awaitable task that returns an ISharingResult indicating the result of the write-out operation.
